raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current shape","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's still pulling you back into the weeds?","description":"Establishes Ahmed's current operating mode without assuming a problem, while surfacing where tactical pull is strongest.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope definition","name":"When you think about the next-level Head of Product role, what does good actually look like to you?","description":"Surfaces Ahmed's own definition of senior scope and whether it is framed strategically or tactically.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence target","name":"Which stakeholder forum matters most for your influence at this level?","description":"Identifies where Ahmed believes visibility and trust are won, rather than asking generally about stakeholders.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next ownership","name":"What kind of decision ownership do you want more of next?","description":"Gets concrete about the stretch from execution into strategic ownership without jumping straight to blockers.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation pattern","name":"Where are you still the default executor when you want to be driving through others?","description":"Tests the executor-to-leverage shift and reveals which work he still retains by habit or comfort.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust gap","name":"What trust gap feels most real to you right now?","description":"Invites Ahmed to name the relationship or forum where influence is not yet landing.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Tradeoff ask","name":"What would you stop doing if you wanted to spend more time on strategic ownership?","description":"Forces a real tradeoff between tactical delivery and senior-level work, making the cost of change explicit.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What should I be doing more of to help you build that scope?","description":"Surfaces the manager's role in increasing Ahmed's strategic reach without turning the conversation into generic support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First move","name":"Given what we've covered, where do you want to start first?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete choice Ahmed will make before the next check-in.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
